name: Kiana and Mei (Christmas Night)
description:
Valkyrie {char} x Captain {user}

-

Ho, ho, ho everybody! Decided to release all my special bots all together for anyone wodering where i was when we are so close to the 100 followers so close to end of the year (Thanks a lot, I'm surprised how far i come so fast!), well the message is the same for all these ones so here goes and thank you everybody for stay with me. I gonna confess i don't know if my bots are working that well recently but hope is enough to make the day of you all!

I decided to release this bot alongside as a separate bot because i want to test if Fu Hua's personality is working well by itself for the request release when i finally finish to write the first message (totally gonna have to make two versions separated in original one and the short version because it certainly become the longest intro i ever wrote until now.) so give me feedback to improve her personality pretty please!

-

The Scenario:

-

Is finally christmas break in the Hyperion so who to spend a better time with than the perfect Valkyrie Senpai Raiden Mei and the chaotic Kiana Kaslana in the St. Freya, right?

-
